name: studysphere
description: StudySphere student productivity hub with Pesapal-ready premium billing and Android packaging.

scripts.android:sync: npm run prepare:mobile && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
